case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS MARIO HENRIQUEZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-05-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, LUIS MARIO HENRIQUEZ
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,809.89 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, LUIS MARIO HENRIQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS MARIO HENRIQUEZ GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
